results.query: What are the two sub-layers in each encoder layer of the Transformer model?
results.answer:
Each encoder layer in the Transformer model has two sub-layers: 1. A multi-head self-attention mechanism. 2. A simple, position-wise fully connected feed-forward network. (Document 1, Page 3).

results.query: How does the retriever in RAG models work?
results.answer:
The retriever component `p(z|x)` in RAG models is based on DPR (Dense Passage Retrieval) [26] and follows a bi-encoder architecture (Document 4, Page 3). Specifically, it works as follows: 1.
